ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Type of cell structure (e.g., cells, nuclei) */,
  "physical_size" REAL /* Physical size of the cell structure */,
  "centroid_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the centroid */,
  "centroid_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the centroid */,
  "centroid_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the centroid */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label or identifier for the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_structure FOREIGN KEY ("structure") REFERENCES structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the structure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the structure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the structure was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the structure was last updated */,
  "parent_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent structure (for hierarchical structures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein was last updated */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein expression record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the protein expression belongs to */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being expressed */,
  "mean_level" REAL /* Mean expression level of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expression record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expression record was last updated */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the protein expression levels */,
  "min_level" REAL /* Minimum expression level of the protein */,
  "max_level" REAL /* Maximum expression level of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_expression_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_expression_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microscopy_data" (
  "microscopy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microscopy data record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the microscopy data belongs to */,
  "x_corr" REAL /* X-correlation value */,
  "y_corr" REAL /* Y-correlation value */,
  "z_corr" REAL /* Z-correlation value */,
  "r" REAL /* Correlation coefficient */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value */,
  "phi" REAL /* Phi value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the microscopy data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the microscopy data was last updated */,
  "microscope_model" TEXT /* Model of the microscope used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "objective_magnification" TEXT /* Magnification of the objective lens used */,
  "exposure_time" TEXT /* Exposure time of the microscopy image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the microscopy image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microscopy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microscopy_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell size record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the cell size belongs to */,
  "cyto_size" REAL /* Cytoplasmic size */,
  "nuc_size" REAL /* Nuclear size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell size record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell size record was last updated */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., epithelial, fibroblast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_sizes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "r_neigh" REAL /* Radius of the neighborhood */,
  "r_neigh_mean" REAL /* Mean radius of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was last updated */,
  "cell_density" REAL /* Density of cells in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein ratio record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the protein ratio belongs to */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being expressed */,
  "nc_ratio" REAL /* Nuclear-cytoplasmic ratio */,
  "nuc" REAL /* Nuclear expression level */,
  "cyto" REAL /* Cytoplasmic expression level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein ratio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein ratio record was last updated */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the nuclear-cytoplasmic ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_ratios_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_ratios_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
